title: Crunchy Romantic Uruguayan Potato Stir-fry
description: This spicy and crunchy dish features red potatoes blended with a plant-based friendly marinade to create a romantic twist on traditional Uruguayan potato stir-fry.

ingredients.name: Chili flakes
ingredients.notes: Red pepper flakes or vegan chili flakes can be used

ingredients.name: Plant-based vegetable oil
ingredients.notes: Canola, soybean, or any other suitable plant-based oil

ingredients.name: Spices (optional)
ingredients.notes: Including paprika for a deeper flavor, or any other spices you prefer

instructions: Blanch the potatoes in boiling water for about 5 minutes until soft.
Remove the potatoes from the pot and allow to cool. Then cut them into bite-sized pieces.
In a blender or food processor, blend together the cooled potatoes with lime juice, salt, and spices if using.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add oil and swirl it around the pan.
Add the garlic and chili flakes to the pan and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the potato mixture from the blender into the hot pan, stirring quickly with tongs or spatula to form clusters of potatoes (like nuggets).
Cook for another minute until all the moisture evaporates and the pieces become crispy and golden brown on top.
